completed_steps.summary: Classified ruoyi-docman as a single-part monolith backend module rooted at ruoyi-modules/ruoyi-docman; detected one Java/Maven part with controller, application, domain, infrastructure, mapper, plugin and job layers.
No README.md or dedicated module documentation was found inside ruoyi-docman; captured user guidance to focus on function-level comments for the module.
Detected Java 17 + Maven + Spring Boot 3.5 backend stack with MyBatis-Plus, Sa-Token, Warm-Flow, Redis, OSS/SSE integration and 69 JUnit/Mockito based tests.

Completed exhaustive scan of 145 source files and 69 test files; extracted 8 REST controllers, 8 persisted domain entities, plugin runtime orchestration, workflow integration, archive flow and local/OSS document storage fallback points.
Generated an annotated source tree for ruoyi-docman, including controller/API entry points, plugin/runtime directories, mapper resources, jobs, listeners and test package coverage.
Generated architecture.md covering layered boundaries, workflow/plugin orchestration, archive flow, preview flow, external dependencies and risk points.
Generated supporting docs for overview, API contracts, persistence model and local development workflow tailored to the ruoyi-docman backend module.
Generated index.md as the primary entry point for AI-assisted development and linked all produced module documents.
Validated generated documentation set manually and recompiled the full ruoyi-docman module after adding function-level comments to controller and application-service entry points.
Workflow complete for ruoyi-docman initial exhaustive scan, documentation generation and function-level comment supplementation.

project_classification.architecture_type: layered backend module with application-domain-infrastructure separation

technology_stack.tech_summary: Java 17, Maven, Spring Boot 3.5, MyBatis-Plus, Sa-Token, Warm-Flow, Redis, OSS/SSE, EasyExcel, Hutool, JUnit 5, Mockito

batches_completed.summary: Extracted REST endpoints for project, member, process, document, archive, dashboard, deadline and plugin operations.
Mapped command/query application services, assembler layer and outbound ports for storage, workflow, AI, knowledge search and notifications.
Captured project/process/document/archive entities, status enums, policy/state machines and read/write context model.
Mapped service implementations, MyBatis mappers, plugin registry/executor, Warm-Flow adapter, jobs and workflow listeners.

resume_instructions: Workflow completed. For future updates, re-run the document-project workflow or start a deep-dive on a specific docman subdomain.

validation_status.verification_summary: Executed `mvn -pl ruoyi-modules/ruoyi-docman -am -DskipTests compile` successfully; ruoyi-docman recompiled 145 source files with BUILD SUCCESS.
open_risks: 本次补充的函数级注释集中在 controller 与 application/service 公开入口，service 接口和部分 domain/service 仍可继续补充到同一粒度。
next_checks: 如需更严格验证，可再运行 ruoyi-docman 的完整测试集或选定 controller/application/service 测试。
